sensor_data: Humidity: 72%, Temperature: 36°C, Coating Thickness: +8%
root_cause: Electrode coating thickness variation exceeded SOP-001 tolerance due to slot-die misalignment
corrective_action: Recalibrate coating machine slot-die gap and verify beta gauge inline measurements.

sensor_data: Weld Energy: 650 J, Contact Resistance: 12 mΩ, Clamp Pressure: 0.3 MPa
root_cause: Insufficient ultrasonic tab weld energy below SOP-004 minimum threshold
corrective_action: Increase weld energy to 1000 J and re-qualify welding horn alignment.

sensor_data: Electrolyte Fill: +3.2%, Formation Temp: 52°C, Cell Pressure: 1.8 bar
root_cause: Electrolyte over-fill combined with elevated formation temperature
corrective_action: Adjust vacuum fill cycle timing and reduce formation charge rate to 0.03C.

sensor_data: Formation Cycle 2 Voltage Delta: 85 mV, SEI Resistance: elevated
root_cause: Incomplete SEI formation due to dry room humidity spike during electrode handling
corrective_action: Verify dry room dew point sensors and replace desiccant in electrode storage airlocks.

sensor_data: Drying Temp: 74°C, Residual NMP: 850 ppm, Coating Weight: -4%
root_cause: Drying oven temperature below SOP-003 minimum caused incomplete solvent removal
corrective_action: Recalibrate drying oven thermocouples and extend primary drying phase by 20 minutes.

sensor_data: Winding Tension: +12%, Separator Offset: 1.2 mm, Edge Burr: detected
root_cause: Electrode edge burr from calendering combined with separator misalignment per SOP-009
corrective_action: Inspect calendering rolls for damage and reset winding tension synchronization.

sensor_data: Seal Temp: 175°C, Seal Width: 2.1 mm, Helium Leak Rate: 3.2×10⁻⁶
root_cause: Heat seal temperature below SOP-008 specification causing incomplete polymer fusion
corrective_action: Increase seal bar temperature to 185°C and verify seal bar pressure uniformity.

sensor_data: Calendering Pressure: 62 MPa, Cathode Porosity: 18%, IR: 45 mΩ
root_cause: Over-calendering reduced cathode porosity below SOP-007 acceptable range
corrective_action: Reduce calendering line pressure to 50 MPa and re-verify porosity on pilot roll.

sensor_data: Aging Room Temp: 31°C, Humidity: 58%, Capacity Retention: 91%
root_cause: Aging room temperature exceeded SOP-010 limit accelerating side reactions
corrective_action: Repair aging room HVAC unit and quarantine affected batch for re-grading.

sensor_data: Weld Energy: 1450 J, Separator Damage: yes, Microscopy: nugget penetration
root_cause: Excessive ultrasonic weld energy penetrated separator layer per SOP-004
corrective_action: Reduce weld energy to 950 J and implement post-weld separator integrity check.

sensor_data: Humidity: 68%, Coating Thickness: +5%, Dry Room Dew Point: -35°C
root_cause: Moisture exposure during electrode transfer between coating and drying lines
corrective_action: Install additional airlock between lines and enforce SOP-002 humidity monitoring.

sensor_data: Formation Temp: 48°C, Voltage Plateau: irregular, Charge Capacity: -6%
root_cause: Contaminated electrolyte batch with elevated water content
corrective_action: Quarantine electrolyte lot, perform Karl Fischer water content test, switch to backup lot.

sensor_data: Weld Pull Strength: 9 N, Clamp Pressure: 0.25 MPa, Weld Time: 80 ms
root_cause: Tab welding clamp pressure below SOP-004 minimum during high-throughput shift
corrective_action: Recalibrate pneumatic clamp system and add inline pull-test sampling.

sensor_data: Fill Volume: -2.8%, Vacuum Hold: 35 sec, Cell IR: 38 mΩ
root_cause: Shortened vacuum hold time in electrolyte filling per SOP-005
corrective_action: Restore vacuum hold to 60 seconds and verify fill pump calibration.

sensor_data: Calendering Pressure: 28 MPa, Anode Adhesion: fail, Winding Speed: 12 m/min
root_cause: Under-calendering on anode roll caused poor adhesion during high-speed winding
corrective_action: Increase anode calendering pressure to 40 MPa per SOP-007 and reduce winding speed.

sensor_data: Humidity: 65%, Temperature: 28°C, Coating Thickness: +3%
root_cause: Gradual slot-die wear causing coating thickness drift over production run
corrective_action: Replace slot-die insert and implement shift-end coating weight verification.

sensor_data: Seal Integrity: marginal, Aging OCV Drop: 15 mV/day, Moisture: 52 ppm
root_cause: Micro-leak in pouch seal allowing moisture ingress during aging
corrective_action: Increase seal dwell time to 4 seconds and add 100% helium leak screening.

sensor_data: Formation IR: 28 mΩ, Post-Aging IR: 42 mΩ, EIS: SEI growth
root_cause: Extended aging at borderline humidity accelerated SEI thickening
corrective_action: Tighten aging room humidity control to below 40% and reduce aging time to 72 hours.

sensor_data: Humidity: 71%, Coating Thickness: +6%, Line Stop: none
root_cause: Operators continued production despite humidity alarm per SOP-002 violation
corrective_action: Enforce automatic line interlock on humidity exceedance and retrain operators.

sensor_data: Separator Offset: 0.9 mm, Winding Alignment: fail, C-Rate Delta: -12%
root_cause: Separator misalignment during jelly roll winding per SOP-009
corrective_action: Reset winding alignment cameras and perform manual alignment verification on startup.

sensor_data: Humidity: 68%, Temperature: 34°C, Coating Thickness: +7%
root_cause: Electrode coating variation and elevated dry room humidity during production
corrective_action: Recalibrate coating machine and enforce SOP-002 humidity interlock before line restart.
